name: Glencore plc
content: Glencore is one of the world's largest diversified natural resource companies, producing and marketing over 60 commodities. The company is a major producer of copper, cobalt, and nickel, which are critical for battery technology and electrification. Glencore also operates a massive battery metal recycling and trading arm, providing a unique "circular economy" play within the energy transition theme. Its global scale and integrated business model allow it to capture value across the entire mineral supply chain.
